name: Bean Thread Salad (Yum Woon Sen)
recipeIngredient: 4 or 5 medium raw prawns, shelled and deveined
1 or 2 medium button mushrooms, thinly sliced
1 Celery stalk, thinly sliced at an angle
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound dried shrimp in a mortar to flatten them into soft, crumbly pieces. They should still be in relatively whole pieces. Set aside.
2. Soak the mung bean thread noodles in water for 1 hour until soft. Using a strainer to hold the noodles, dip them into boiling water for 1 second. Remove and immediately dip into ice water to stop the cooking. Drain well and set aside.
3. Using a strainer to hold the prawns, boil for 6 seconds until they turn pink. Drain well.
4. Combine prawns and lime juice in a medium bowl; let stand 1 minute. Add the dried shrimp, noodles, fish sauce, sugar, mushrooms, celery, green onions, and coriander leaves.
5. Arrange the salad on a bed of lettuce and serve immediately.
